use_case.summary: Prospect wants a one-off post-event satisfaction form with CSV export.
explicit_quotes: We just need a form for our annual user conference

cx_maturity.rationale: Single touchpoint, no segmentation, no action loop discussed.

feature_requests.feature: Salesforce two-way sync for renewal-stage variables
feature_requests.quote: If it doesn't push back to SFDC opportunity, it's a no-go
Would be nice to slice by ARR tier

competitors_mentioned.name: Qualtrics
competitors_mentioned.quote: We're comparing you with Qualtrics on price

trial_issues.issue: Trial workspace did not include sample CRM-variable data
trial_issues.quote: We couldn't really test the segmentation in trial

no_reference_customer.quote: Do you have anyone in fintech I can talk to?

pricing_concern.quote: Qualtrics gave us a much lower price on the same volume

product_gap.quote: We need real-time Slack alerts on detractors

other: Procurement requires SOC2 Type II report up front

barge_in_examples: AE cut SE off mid-demo of dashboards to pivot to pricing
AE interrupted SE's discovery question to talk about the deal timeline
AE talked over SE during competitor objection handling

se_selling_style.evidence: SE tied dashboard demo to 'fewer surprise churns at renewal' — value framing

buying_signals: Wanted to loop in CFO for next call
objections: Concerns about migration from current tool

use_case.summary: Prospect wants relationship NPS across customer base with renewal-risk alerts to CSMs and quarterly exec review.
explicit_quotes: We need to know which accounts are at risk before renewal

cx_maturity.rationale: Multi-touchpoint program with CRM-linked workflow ownership.
